requirement_topic.en: Market Access — INNOQ Conformity Assessment / Import Inspection + In-Country Importer of Record
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——INNOQ合格评定/进口检验+在地进口记录方
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——INNOQ合格評定/進口檢驗+在地進口記錄方

summary.en: Mozambique has no single CE-equivalent mark. Market access for household refrigerating appliances rests on three pillars: (1) INNOQ (Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade) — the national standards and quality body — develops NM standards (adopting IEC) and operates conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products; for an electrical appliance this means demonstrating conformity to the adopted NM/IEC 60335-2-24 safety standard, typically via a recognised test report (an IECEE CB Scheme / ILAC MRA-accepted report being the most efficient route). (2) An in-country importer of record established in Mozambique is required to bring goods through customs and assume local responsibilities; a foreign manufacturer cannot self-import without a local importer. (3) Import consignments of regulated products may be subject to INNOQ import inspection / conformity verification before customs release at the port of entry (principal ports: Maputo, Beira, Nacala). Product documentation, instructions and markings must be in Portuguese. Exact regulated-product scope and the precise pre-import procedure should be confirmed with INNOQ.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克没有单一等同CE的标识。家用制冷器具的市场准入依托三大支柱：（1）INNOQ（国家标准化与质量研究所）——国家标准与质量机构——制定NM标准（采纳IEC）并对受监管产品实施合格评定与进口检验；对电气器具而言，即须证明符合所采纳的NM/IEC 60335-2-24安全标准，通常通过被承认的检测报告（以IECEE CB体系/ILAC MRA接受报告为最高效路径）。（2）须有在莫桑比克设立的在地进口记录方将货物通关并承担本地责任；外国制造商不能在无本地进口商的情况下自行进口。（3）受监管产品进口货物在入境港（主要港口：马普托、贝拉、纳卡拉）海关放行前可能须经INNOQ进口检验/合格验证。产品文件、说明书及标识须为葡萄牙语。受监管产品的确切范围及具体进口前程序应向INNOQ确认。
summary.zht: 莫三比克沒有單一等同CE的標識。家用製冷器具的市場准入依託三大支柱：（1）INNOQ（國家標準化與品質研究所）——國家標準與品質機構——制定NM標準（採納IEC）並對受監管產品實施合格評定與進口檢驗；對電氣器具而言，即須證明符合所採納的NM/IEC 60335-2-24安全標準，通常透過被承認的檢測報告（以IECEE CB體系/ILAC MRA接受報告為最高效路徑）。（2）須有在莫三比克設立的在地進口記錄方將貨物通關並承擔本地責任；外國製造商不能在無本地進口商的情況下自行進口。（3）受監管產品進口貨物在入境港（主要港口：馬普托、貝拉、納卡拉）海關放行前可能須經INNOQ進口檢驗/合格驗證。產品文件、說明書及標識須為葡萄牙語。受監管產品的確切範圍及具體進口前程序應向INNOQ確認。

standards_or_laws: INNOQ (Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade) — national standards / quality body; NM standards (adopting IEC), conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products
NM/IEC 60335-2-24 — adopted safety standard demonstrated for the appliance (see safety row)
Mozambique customs / import-of-record requirement — in-country importer established in Mozambique required to clear goods
Portuguese-language documentation requirement — instructions, markings and safety information in Portuguese

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, plus a separate China Energy Label (GB 12021.2) requirement. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies; the certificate holder is the responsible party for the domestic market. There is no single CE-equivalent mark, and the Chinese domestic regime does not extend to or substitute for Mozambique market-access requirements — a CCC certificate is not recognised by INNOQ, and there is no Chinese-side equivalent of the in-country-importer or import-inspection obligation for the destination market.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并另需中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构审核；证书持有人为国内市场责任方。中国没有单一等同CE的标识，且国内制度不延伸至或替代莫桑比克市场准入要求——CCC证书不被INNOQ承认，中国侧亦无对应目的市场在地进口商或进口检验义务的等同规定。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並另需中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構審核；證書持有人為國內市場責任方。中國沒有單一等同CE的標識，且國內制度不延伸至或替代莫三比克市場准入要求——CCC證書不被INNOQ承認，中國側亦無對應目的市場在地進口商或進口檢驗義務的等同規定。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a Mozambique-facing market-access package; the Chinese CCC and CEL do not substitute for any Mozambique requirement: (1) Conformity evidence — a test report demonstrating conformity to the adopted NM/IEC 60335-2-24 safety standard, ideally via an IECEE CB Scheme / ILAC MRA-accepted report (the shared IEC base makes Chinese test data largely reusable but it must be re-presented against the recognised standard; the CCC certificate itself is not accepted). (2) In-country importer — a Mozambique-established importer of record must be appointed to clear and place the goods; this is a hard practical gate with no Chinese-side equivalent. (3) Import inspection — regulated consignments may face INNOQ inspection / conformity verification at the port before release. (4) Portuguese documentation — instructions, safety information and markings must be provided in Portuguese. (5) Radio modules — any wireless feature requires separate INCM type approval (see EMC row). The precise regulated-product scope and pre-import procedure (e.g. any pre-shipment conformity certificate requirement) should be confirmed with INNOQ before the first shipment.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须建立面向莫桑比克的市场准入文件包；中国CCC和CEL均不能替代任何莫桑比克要求：（1）合格证据——证明符合所采纳NM/IEC 60335-2-24安全标准的检测报告，最好通过IECEE CB体系/ILAC MRA接受报告（共享IEC基础使中国测试数据大体可复用，但须依据被承认标准重新呈现；CCC证书本身不被接受）。（2）在地进口商——须委任在莫桑比克设立的进口记录方通关并投放货物；这是无中国侧等同的硬性实务门槛。（3）进口检验——受监管货物在放行前可能面临港口INNOQ检验/合格验证。（4）葡萄牙语文件——说明书、安全信息及标识须提供葡萄牙语版本。（5）射频模块——任何无线功能须另行取得INCM型式核准（见EMC行）。受监管产品的确切范围及进口前程序（如任何装运前合格证书要求）应在首批出货前向INNOQ确认。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須建立面向莫三比克的市場准入文件包；中國CCC和CEL均不能替代任何莫三比克要求：（1）合格證據——證明符合所採納NM/IEC 60335-2-24安全標準的檢測報告，最好透過IECEE CB體系/ILAC MRA接受報告（共享IEC基礎使中國測試數據大體可複用，但須依據被承認標準重新呈現；CCC證書本身不被接受）。（2）在地進口商——須委任在莫三比克設立的進口記錄方通關並投放貨物；這是無中國側等同的硬性實務門檻。（3）進口檢驗——受監管貨物在放行前可能面臨港口INNOQ檢驗/合格驗證。（4）葡萄牙語文件——說明書、安全資訊及標識須提供葡萄牙語版本。（5）射頻模組——任何無線功能須另行取得INCM型式核准（見EMC行）。受監管產品的確切範圍及進口前程序（如任何裝運前合格證書要求）應在首批出貨前向INNOQ確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — an in-country importer of record is required to clear goods; conformity to the adopted NM/IEC 60335-2-24 standard and any INNOQ import inspection apply to regulated products; Portuguese documentation required. Exact regulated-product scope to be confirmed with INNOQ.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: INNOQ — Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (Mozambique)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mozambique has no single CE-equivalent mark. Market access for refrigerators requires conformity to the adopted NM/IEC 60335-2-24 standard (CCC not recognised; demonstrate via an IECEE CB Scheme report), an in-country importer of record, possible INNOQ import inspection at the port (Maputo / Beira / Nacala), and Portuguese-language documentation. Confirm the exact regulated-product scope and pre-import procedure with INNOQ before the first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莫桑比克没有单一等同CE的标识。冰箱的市场准入须符合所采纳的NM/IEC 60335-2-24标准（CCC不被承认；通过IECEE CB体系报告证明）、须有在地进口记录方、港口（马普托/贝拉/纳卡拉）可能进行INNOQ进口检验，并须提供葡萄牙语文件。首批出货前请向INNOQ确认受监管产品的确切范围及进口前程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 莫三比克沒有單一等同CE的標識。冰箱的市場准入須符合所採納的NM/IEC 60335-2-24標準（CCC不被承認；透過IECEE CB體系報告證明）、須有在地進口記錄方、港口（馬普托/貝拉/納卡拉）可能進行INNOQ進口檢驗，並須提供葡萄牙語文件。首批出貨前請向INNOQ確認受監管產品的確切範圍及進口前程序。

requirement_topic.zh: 文件、标识、插头/电压及葡萄牙语语言要求
requirement_topic.zht: 文件、標識、插頭/電壓及葡萄牙語語言要求

summary.en: Beyond the conformity-assessment route, a refrigerator placed on the Mozambique market must meet documentation, marking and electrical-fit requirements: (1) Language — instructions for use, safety information, warranty and product markings must be provided in Portuguese, Mozambique's official language. (2) Electrical fit — the grid is 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase nominal; this is closely aligned with China (both 50 Hz; China single-phase nominal also ~220 V, with three-phase at 380 V), so frequency/voltage adaptation is minimal for single-phase household refrigerators. Plug/socket type should match Mozambique practice (commonly Type C/D/M and South-African-style plugs are encountered); the supplied cord/plug or a compliant adaptor strategy should be confirmed with the importer. (3) Markings — rated voltage/frequency, power, refrigerant type and charge (R-600a, grams), model and manufacturer/importer identification should appear on the rating plate and documentation per the adopted NM/IEC 60335-2-24 marking clauses. (4) Importer identification — the in-country importer's details typically appear on the product or packaging. Confirm the exact plug standard, rating-plate language, and any local marking specifics with INNOQ and the importer.
summary.zh: 除合格评定路径外，投放莫桑比克市场的冰箱须满足文件、标识及电气适配要求：（1）语言——使用说明书、安全信息、保修及产品标识须以莫桑比克官方语言葡萄牙语提供。（2）电气适配——电网为220 V、50 Hz单相额定；与中国高度接近（同为50 Hz；中国单相额定也约220 V，三相为380 V），故单相家用冰箱的频率/电压适配极小。插头/插座类型应符合莫桑比克惯例（常见Type C/D/M及南非式插头）；随附线缆/插头或合规转换策略应与进口商确认。（3）标识——额定电压/频率、功率、制冷剂类型及充注量（R-600a，克）、型号及制造商/进口商标识，应依据所采纳NM/IEC 60335-2-24标识条款出现在铭牌和文件上。（4）进口商标识——在地进口商信息通常出现在产品或包装上。请向INNOQ和进口商确认确切插头标准、铭牌语言及任何本地标识细节。
summary.zht: 除合格評定路徑外，投放莫三比克市場的冰箱須滿足文件、標識及電氣適配要求：（1）語言——使用說明書、安全資訊、保固及產品標識須以莫三比克官方語言葡萄牙語提供。（2）電氣適配——電網為220 V、50 Hz單相額定；與中國高度接近（同為50 Hz；中國單相額定也約220 V，三相為380 V），故單相家用冰箱的頻率/電壓適配極小。插頭/插座類型應符合莫三比克慣例（常見Type C/D/M及南非式插頭）；隨附線纜/插頭或合規轉換策略應與進口商確認。（3）標識——額定電壓/頻率、功率、製冷劑類型及充注量（R-600a，克）、型號及製造商/進口商標識，應依據所採納NM/IEC 60335-2-24標識條款出現在銘牌和文件上。（4）進口商標識——在地進口商資訊通常出現在產品或包裝上。請向INNOQ和進口商確認確切插頭標準、銘牌語言及任何本地標識細節。

standards_or_laws: Portuguese-language requirement — instructions, safety information, warranty and markings in Portuguese (official language of Mozambique)
NM/IEC 60335-2-24 marking clauses — rating plate (voltage, frequency, power, refrigerant type/charge, model, manufacturer/importer)
Mozambique mains supply — 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase nominal; plug types commonly C / D / M (and South-African-style); confirm with importer

summary.en: For the Chinese domestic market, documentation and markings are provided in Chinese and the appliance is built for the China grid (single-phase ~220 V, 50 Hz; three-phase 380 V), using GB 1002/GB 2099 plug/socket standards. Rating-plate and marking content follows GB 4706.13 / GB 4706.1 marking clauses (derived from IEC 60335). There is no Portuguese-language obligation and no Mozambique importer-identification requirement for the domestic product. The shared 50 Hz frequency and similar single-phase nominal voltage mean the electrical engineering of a China-built single-phase refrigerator transfers well to Mozambique; the main physical adaptation is the plug/cord and the language of documentation and markings.
summary.zh: 对中国国内市场，文件和标识以中文提供，器具按中国电网（单相约220 V、50 Hz；三相380 V）制造，采用GB 1002/GB 2099插头/插座标准。铭牌及标识内容遵循GB 4706.13 / GB 4706.1标识条款（源自IEC 60335）。国内产品无葡萄牙语义务，亦无莫桑比克进口商标识要求。共享的50 Hz频率及相近的单相额定电压意味着中国制造的单相冰箱的电气工程可很好地转用于莫桑比克；主要物理适配为插头/线缆及文件和标识的语言。
summary.zht: 對中國國內市場，文件和標識以中文提供，器具按中國電網（單相約220 V、50 Hz；三相380 V）製造，採用GB 1002/GB 2099插頭/插座標準。銘牌及標識內容遵循GB 4706.13 / GB 4706.1標識條款（源自IEC 60335）。國內產品無葡萄牙語義務，亦無莫三比克進口商標識要求。共享的50 Hz頻率及相近的單相額定電壓意味著中國製造的單相冰箱的電氣工程可很好地轉用於莫三比克；主要物理適配為插頭/線纜及文件和標識的語言。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 / GB 4706.1-2005 — marking clauses for the Chinese domestic rating plate (derived from IEC 60335)
GB 1002 / GB 2099 — Chinese plug and socket-outlet standards (domestic plug type)

gap.en: The gaps are practical localisation items, eased by close electrical alignment: (1) Language — all instructions, safety information and markings must be translated into Portuguese; Chinese-only documentation is not acceptable. (2) Plug/cord — the Chinese GB plug must be replaced with a Mozambique-appropriate type (commonly C/D/M / South-African-style); confirm the exact required plug with the importer. (3) Rating-plate / marking — must include refrigerant type and charge (R-600a, grams) and importer identification, per the adopted NM/IEC 60335-2-24 marking clauses, in Portuguese. (4) Voltage/frequency — minimal adaptation: Mozambique 220 V / 50 Hz is closely aligned with China's single-phase 220 V / 50 Hz, so the cooling system and motor do not need frequency redesign (a key advantage versus 60 Hz markets). Mozambique does not impose EU-style horizontal regimes such as RoHS substance restrictions, battery directives, or outdoor-noise marking on refrigerators, so those EU-specific documentation burdens do not apply here. Confirm the official plug standard and any local marking specifics with INNOQ and the importer before production for export.
gap.zh: 差距为实务本地化项，并因电气高度一致而减轻：（1）语言——所有说明书、安全信息及标识须译为葡萄牙语；仅中文文件不被接受。（2）插头/线缆——中国GB插头须更换为莫桑比克适用类型（常见C/D/M/南非式）；确切所需插头请与进口商确认。（3）铭牌/标识——须依据所采纳NM/IEC 60335-2-24标识条款，以葡萄牙语包含制冷剂类型及充注量（R-600a，克）及进口商标识。（4）电压/频率——适配极小：莫桑比克220 V / 50 Hz与中国单相220 V / 50 Hz高度一致，故制冷系统和电机无需频率重新设计（相较60 Hz市场的关键优势）。莫桑比克未对冰箱施加欧盟式横向制度，如RoHS物质限制、电池指令或户外噪声标识，故这些欧盟特有的文件负担在此不适用。出口生产前请向INNOQ和进口商确认官方插头标准及任何本地标识细节。
gap.zht: 差距為實務本地化項，並因電氣高度一致而減輕：（1）語言——所有說明書、安全資訊及標識須譯為葡萄牙語；僅中文文件不被接受。（2）插頭/線纜——中國GB插頭須更換為莫三比克適用類型（常見C/D/M/南非式）；確切所需插頭請與進口商確認。（3）銘牌/標識——須依據所採納NM/IEC 60335-2-24標識條款，以葡萄牙語包含製冷劑類型及充注量（R-600a，克）及進口商標識。（4）電壓/頻率——適配極小：莫三比克220 V / 50 Hz與中國單相220 V / 50 Hz高度一致，故製冷系統和電機無需頻率重新設計（相較60 Hz市場的關鍵優勢）。莫三比克未對冰箱施加歐盟式橫向制度，如RoHS物質限制、電池指令或戶外噪聲標識，故這些歐盟特有的文件負擔在此不適用。出口生產前請向INNOQ和進口商確認官方插頭標準及任何本地標識細節。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — Portuguese-language documentation and markings required; rating-plate content per adopted NM/IEC 60335-2-24; plug/cord must suit Mozambique. No EU-style RoHS / battery / outdoor-noise horizontal regimes apply to refrigerators. Confirm plug standard and marking specifics with INNOQ / importer.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Chinese-language documentation and GB-standard plug/marking required for the domestic market under GB 4706.13 / GB 4706.1 and GB 1002 / GB 2099

source.publisher: INNOQ — Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (Mozambique)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Localisation for Mozambique is light and eased by close electrical alignment: documentation, safety information and markings must be in Portuguese; the plug/cord must suit Mozambique (commonly C/D/M / South-African-style); the rating plate must declare R-600a type and charge and importer identification. Voltage/frequency adaptation is minimal (220 V / 50 Hz, same frequency as China). Mozambique imposes no EU-style RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise horizontal regimes on refrigerators. Confirm the plug standard and marking specifics with INNOQ and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向莫桑比克的本地化较轻，并因电气高度一致而简化：文件、安全信息及标识须为葡萄牙语；插头/线缆须适配莫桑比克（常见C/D/M/南非式）；铭牌须声明R-600a类型及充注量与进口商标识。电压/频率适配极小（220 V / 50 Hz，与中国同频）。莫桑比克未对冰箱施加欧盟式RoHS、电池或户外噪声横向制度。请向INNOQ和进口商确认插头标准及标识细节。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向莫三比克的本地化較輕，並因電氣高度一致而簡化：文件、安全資訊及標識須為葡萄牙語；插頭/線纜須適配莫三比克（常見C/D/M/南非式）；銘牌須聲明R-600a類型及充注量與進口商標識。電壓/頻率適配極小（220 V / 50 Hz，與中國同頻）。莫三比克未對冰箱施加歐盟式RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲橫向制度。請向INNOQ和進口商確認插頭標準及標識細節。
